name: Madan Bhandari
title: Director
message: Welcome to Airplusnepal, and thank you for considering our team for your journey here. We know a trip to Nepal is a big experience for many people, and we do not take that trust lightly.

I began my work in tourism on the trail as a guide. Over the years, I learned that travelers remember more than the mountains. They also remember whether they felt listened to, well paced, and genuinely cared for along the way.
That is how we try to work every day. We keep our advice honest, our planning practical, and our support personal, so your time in Nepal feels memorable for the right reasons.
